voice.title: Voice-Guided Profile Creation
voice.errorDesc: Please try speaking again or use manual input.
voice.notSupportedDesc: Your browser doesn't support voice recognition. Please use manual input.
voice.name: Name

prompts.role: Hello! I'm here to help you create your profile. What type of job or role are you looking for?
prompts.name: Great! Now, what's your full name?
prompts.currentLocation: Where are you currently located? Please mention your city and state.
prompts.desiredLocation: Where would you prefer to work? This can be the same as your current location or somewhere else.
prompts.experience: Tell me about your work experience. What was your last job position and company?
prompts.review: Perfect! Your profile is almost complete. Would you like to review it?

voice.ageRetry: I didn't catch your age. Please say your age as a number.
voice.changePrompt: What would you like to change?
